question: Where is the soccer ball located? Select from the following options: (A) On the ground in the bottom left corner. (B) In the air in the top right corner. (C) On the ground in the bottom right corner. (D) In the air in the top left corner.
gold_answer: In the air in the top left corner
answer_choices: On the ground in the bottom left corner
In the air in the top right corner
On the ground in the bottom right corner
In the air in the top left corner
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
